entity.label: Tappuah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the valley or lowland of Judah; formerly a royal city of the Canaanites (Josh. 12:17; 15:34). It is now called Tuffuh, about 12 miles west of Jerusalem.

nodes.label: Tappuah
nodes.description: A town in the valley or lowland of Judah; formerly a royal city of the Canaanites (Josh. 12:17; 15:34). It is now called Tuffuh, about 12 miles west of Jerusalem.

verses.text: And Zanoah, and Engannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
